body_excerpt: In usim_SendMCCMNCIndMsg of usim_Registration.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to memory corruption. This could lead to physical escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
